ground_truth.title: Marietta Electricians Costs & Prices - ProMatcher Cost Report
ground_truth.main_content: The Marietta Electricians Cost Report is a concise report on everything you need to know about the cost of electricians in the Marietta area. Average electrician costs in Marietta include: $80.45 per hour for electrical work during remodel or addition (range $76.16 - $84.73); $132.33 fixed fee to install 120v outlet (range $123.76 - $140.90); $2,008.72 fixed fee to upgrade panel to 200 amps (range $1,732.64 - $2,284.80); $68.55 per hour for residential electrical contractors (range $61.88 - $75.21); $84.73 per hour for commercial electrical contractors (range $80.92 - $88.54). EV charging station installation costs range from $152.03 - $247.05 for level 1 chargers (120 volts) and $1,055.67 - $1,149.74 for level 2 chargers (240 volts). Professionals in the area have provided detailed cost reports including labor, materials, permits, and exclusions for various electrical services.
